meta.source: The Handbook of Electronic Trading - Joseph Rosen (2008)

vwap.name: VWAP Execution
vwap.description: Volume-Weighted Average Price algorithm slices large orders to match historical volume profile
vwap.objective: Achieve average execution price close to VWAP benchmark; minimize market impact

parameters.time_horizon: Full trading session or specified window

twap.name: TWAP Execution
twap.description: Time-Weighted Average Price algorithm distributes order evenly across time intervals
twap.objective: Minimize market impact by spreading execution over time regardless of volume

parameters.intervals: Equal time slices across execution window
parameters.cancel_replace: Reprice unfilled slices at new levels

implementation_shortfall.name: Implementation Shortfall (Arrival Price)
implementation_shortfall.description: Minimize difference between decision price and actual execution price
implementation_shortfall.objective: Balance market impact cost vs timing risk; aggressive when price moves favorably

parameters.front_loading: More aggressive early in volatile markets

best_for: When arrival price is the benchmark
risks: High market impact if too aggressive

smart_order_routing.name: Smart Order Routing (SOR)
smart_order_routing.description: Route orders across multiple venues to achieve best execution
smart_order_routing.objective: Find best price and liquidity across fragmented markets (ECNs, ATSs, exchanges)

statistical_arbitrage_execution.name: Statistical Arbitrage (Black Box)
statistical_arbitrage_execution.description: High-frequency analysis of historical and real-time data for sub-second opportunities
statistical_arbitrage_execution.objective: Exploit temporary pricing inefficiencies and trend violations

iceberg_orders.name: Iceberg / Hidden Orders
iceberg_orders.description: Display only small portion of total order size to avoid signaling intent
iceberg_orders.objective: Reduce market impact by hiding true order size

pairs_trading_execution.name: Pairs Trading Execution
pairs_trading_execution.description: Simultaneously long undervalued and short overvalued correlated securities
pairs_trading_execution.objective: Market-neutral profit from convergence of correlated pair
risks: Leg risk (one side fills, other doesn't)

order_types.market: Immediate execution at best available price
order_types.limit: Execute at specified price or better
order_types.stop: Triggered market order when price reaches level
order_types.stop_limit: Triggered limit order when price reaches level

venue_types.ecn: Electronic Communications Network — anonymous order matching

execution_quality_metrics.slippage: Difference between expected and actual fill price
execution_quality_metrics.market_impact: Price movement caused by the order itself
execution_quality_metrics.latency: Time from order submission to execution
